title: scrophularia macrophylla
intro: Scrophularia macrophylla, also known as great figwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the figwort family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. This plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tea, tincture, and dried extract, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
